requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport Safety Testing — UN 38.3 (Estonia Port of Entry: Tallinn / Muuga Harbour)
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输安全测试——UN 38.3（爱沙尼亚入境港：塔林港/穆加港）
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸安全測試——UN 38.3（愛沙尼亞入境港：塔林港/穆加港）

summary.en: All lithium cells and batteries (including BESS modules) shipped internationally must pass the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 test series (T1–T8: altitude simulation, thermal, vibration, shock, external short circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, forced discharge). The current edition is Rev.8 (2023) with Amendment 1 (2025) (ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8). A UN 38.3 test summary or full test report must accompany each shipment. The UN number classification is UN 3480 (lithium-ion batteries, packed alone) or UN 3481 (lithium-ion batteries contained in or packed with equipment). For shipments to Estonia, the primary port of entry is the Port of Tallinn (Tallinna Sadam) or Muuga Harbour (Muuga Sadam), one of the largest ports in the Baltic Sea. Transport by road in Europe is governed by ADR (European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road); by sea by IMDG Code; by air by IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations. Estonia applies EU/ADR rules for dangerous goods road transport across all Baltic states transit legs.
summary.zh: 所有国际运输的锂电芯及电池（包括BESS模块）须通过《联合国关于危险货物运输的建议书——试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3节T1–T8系列测试（高度模拟、热稳定性、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击/挤压、过充、强制放电）。现行版本为Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）（ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8）。每票货物须随附UN 38.3测试摘要或完整报告。UN编号分类为UN 3480（单独包装的锂离子电池）或UN 3481（与设备一同或含于设备内的锂离子电池）。运往爱沙尼亚的货物，主要入境港为塔林港（Tallinna Sadam）或穆加港（Muuga Sadam），后者是波罗的海最大港口之一。欧洲公路运输受ADR规管，海运受IMDG Code规管，空运受IATA危险品规则规管。爱沙尼亚对贯穿波罗的海各国的所有公路运输段均执行欧盟/ADR危险品规则。
summary.zht: 所有國際運輸的鋰電芯及電池（包括BESS模組）須通過《聯合國關於危險貨物運輸的建議書——試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3節T1–T8系列測試（高度模擬、熱穩定性、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊/擠壓、過充、強制放電）。現行版本為Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）（ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8）。每票貨物須隨附UN 38.3測試摘要或完整報告。UN編號分類為UN 3480（單獨包裝的鋰離子電池）或UN 3481（與設備一同或含於設備內的鋰離子電池）。運往愛沙尼亞的貨物，主要入境港為塔林港（Tallinna Sadam）或穆加港（Muuga Sadam），後者是波羅的海最大港口之一。歐洲公路運輸受ADR規管，海運受IMDG Code規管，空運受IATA危險品規則規管。愛沙尼亞對貫穿波羅的海各國的所有公路運輸段均執行歐盟/ADR危險品規則。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8 (2023) and Amendment 1 (2025))
UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, 23rd revised edition — UN 3480 / UN 3481
ADR 2025 — European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road (Special Provisions 188, 230, 310, 348, 636, 670)
IMDG Code, Amendment 41-22 — Special Provisions 188, 230, 310, 348, 384, 636
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) 65th Edition 2024 — Special Provisions A88, A99, A154, A164, A183, A201, A206
Port of Tallinn / Muuga Harbour dangerous goods handling requirements

summary.en: China applies the same UN 38.3 test standard for export shipments and mirrors it in national regulations. For road transport, the standard GB 15599 (Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road) references UN 38.3. China's GB 38031-2020 (Electric vehicles traction battery safety requirements) mandates UN 38.3-equivalent tests for vehicle-grade cells but is not a transport regulation. Export customs and the Ministry of Transport require a valid UN 38.3 test report and dangerous goods declaration (危险货物运输申报) per JT/T 617 (road) and IMDG/IATA rules for maritime/air. The Civil Aviation Administration of China (CAAC) DGR follows IATA.
summary.zh: 中国对出口货物同样适用UN 38.3测试标准，并在国内法规中予以对应。公路运输参照GB 15599（锂电池公路运输安全要求），该标准引用UN 38.3。GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）对车用电芯规定了UN 38.3等效测试，但并非运输法规。海关及交通运输部要求持有效UN 38.3测试报告并按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA规则进行危险货物申报。中国民用航空局（CAAC）危险品规则遵循IATA。
summary.zht: 中國對出口貨物同樣適用UN 38.3測試標準，並在國內法規中予以對應。公路運輸參照GB 15599（鋰電池公路運輸安全要求），該標準引用UN 38.3。GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）對車用電芯規定了UN 38.3等效測試，但並非運輸法規。海關及交通運輸部要求持有效UN 38.3測試報告並按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA規則進行危險貨物申報。中國民用航空局（CAAC）危險品規則遵循IATA。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (adopted for export)
GB 38031-2020 — Electric vehicles traction battery safety requirements (cell-level UN 38.3 equivalent)
GB 15599 — Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road (current edition — verify via SAC or Ministry of Transport before relying on it)
JT/T 617 — Regulations for road transport of dangerous goods
CAAC Dangerous Goods Regulations (aligned with IATA DGR)

gap.en: Both EU/international and China require UN 38.3 testing, so the test protocol itself is not a gap. The gaps lie in documentation and enforcement: (1) EU/ADR strictly enforces the UN 38.3 test summary requirement at the shipper level — CN exporters sometimes hold only a product certificate without the full T1–T8 summary. (2) ADR 2025 introduces updated SOC (≤30%) and packaging requirements for large-format BESS cells. (3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II thresholds (Wh limits per package) are strictly enforced by EU carriers. (4) Muuga Harbour and the Port of Tallinn have port-authority dangerous goods pre-notification requirements for large energy cargo; Chinese logistics chains need to pre-notify the Estonian port operator (Tallinna Sadam AS). (5) Baltic transit routing may involve multimodal land+sea legs requiring ADR re-documentation.
gap.zh: 欧盟/国际与中国均要求UN 38.3测试，测试协议本身不构成差距。差距在于文件与执法：(1) 欧盟/ADR严格要求托运方层面提供UN 38.3测试摘要（非仅证书）；部分中国出口商仅持产品认证证书而无完整摘要。(2) ADR 2025对大型BESS电芯的荷电状态（SOC≤30%）及包装要求有更新规定。(3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II瓦时限值由欧洲承运人严格执行。(4) 穆加港和塔林港对大型能源货物有港口当局危险品预通报要求；中国物流链须提前通知爱沙尼亚港口运营商（塔林港股份公司Tallinna Sadam AS）。(5) 波罗的海转运路线可能涉及需要ADR重新出单的多式联运陆海段。
gap.zht: 歐盟/國際與中國均要求UN 38.3測試，測試協議本身不構成差距。差距在於文件與執法：(1) 歐盟/ADR嚴格要求托運方層面提供UN 38.3測試摘要（非僅證書）；部分中國出口商僅持產品認證證書而無完整摘要。(2) ADR 2025對大型BESS電芯的荷電狀態（SOC≤30%）及包裝要求有更新規定。(3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II瓦時限值由歐洲承運人嚴格執行。(4) 穆加港和塔林港對大型能源貨物有港口當局危險品預通報要求；中國物流鏈須提前通知愛沙尼亞港口運營商（塔林港股份公司Tallinna Sadam AS）。(5) 波羅的海轉運路線可能涉及需要ADR重新出單的多式聯運陸海段。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 compliance and dangerous goods documentation are legal requirements for all international transport modes under ADR/IMDG/IATA and are enforced by carriers, freight forwarders, and customs authorities including at Muuga Harbour / Port of Tallinn.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — UN 38.3 test report required by customs and carriers; GB 38031-2020 mandatory for EV battery cells sold in China.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. A Chinese BESS exporter shipping to Estonia must hold a valid UN 38.3 test report (T1–T8 summary) for every cell/module type, classify under UN 3480 or UN 3481, comply with ADR (road), IMDG (sea), or IATA (air) packaging and documentation requirements, and ensure SOC does not exceed 30% where required. The Port of Tallinn / Muuga Harbour is the principal Estonian port of entry; pre-notify port authorities for dangerous goods. Consult a certified dangerous goods safety adviser (DGSA) before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国BESS出口商向爱沙尼亚发货，须为每种电芯/模块型号持有有效UN 38.3测试报告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分类，并符合ADR（公路）、IMDG（海运）或IATA（空运）包装及文件要求，并在规定情况下确保荷电状态不超过30%。塔林港/穆加港是爱沙尼亚主要入境港；危险品须提前通知港口当局。首次发货前请咨询具资质的危险品安全顾问（DGSA）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國BESS出口商向愛沙尼亞發貨，須為每種電芯/模組型號持有有效UN 38.3測試報告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分類，並符合ADR（公路）、IMDG（海運）或IATA（空運）包裝及文件要求，並在規定情況下確保荷電狀態不超過30%。塔林港/穆加港是愛沙尼亞主要入境港；危險品須提前通知港口當局。首次發貨前請諮詢具資質的危險品安全顧問（DGSA）。

requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Classification, Packaging & Documentation — ADR / IMDG / IATA (Estonia)
requirement_topic.zh: 危险品分类、包装及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA（爱沙尼亚）
requirement_topic.zht: 危險品分類、包裝及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA（愛沙尼亞）

summary.en: Beyond UN 38.3 testing, EU/international transport law requires: (a) correct UN number (UN 3480/3481) and packing group on all shipping documents; (b) compliant outer packaging (UN-certified for full lithium batteries, or Section II packaging for consumer-type); (c) shipper's Declaration for Dangerous Goods (DGD) for air, or Dangerous Goods Transport Document for road/sea; (d) emergency response information (e.g., ERG, MSDS/SDS); (e) placarding and labelling of packages and vehicles (Class 9 hazard label, lithium battery mark). ADR Chapter 3.3 Special Provision 377 and ADR 2.2.9.1 govern large-format batteries. State-of-charge (SOC) limits apply: ≤30% for air (IATA PI 965 Section IB), and in certain ADR provisions. For transit through Baltic states to/from Estonia, ADR documentation and vehicle placarding must remain valid for road transport across EU member states.
summary.zh: 除UN 38.3测试外，欧盟/国际运输法规还要求：(a) 所有运输单证上注明正确UN编号（UN 3480/3481）及包装组别；(b) 合规外包装（整体锂电池须UN认证包装，消费类可用Section II包装）；(c) 空运须填写危险品申报单（DGD），公路/海运须填写危险品运输文件；(d) 紧急响应信息（如ERG、MSDS/SDS）；(e) 包装及车辆须贴附标记及标签（第9类危险标签、锂电池标识）。ADR第3.3章特殊规定377及ADR 2.2.9.1适用于大型电池。荷电状态限值：空运须≤30%（IATA PI 965 Section IB），某些ADR条款亦有规定。对于途经波罗的海各国往返爱沙尼亚的转运货物，ADR文件及车辆标牌须在贯穿欧盟成员国公路运输期间保持有效。
summary.zht: 除UN 38.3測試外，歐盟/國際運輸法規還要求：(a) 所有運輸單證上註明正確UN編號（UN 3480/3481）及包裝組別；(b) 合規外包裝（整體鋰電池須UN認證包裝，消費類可用Section II包裝）；(c) 空運須填寫危險品申報單（DGD），公路/海運須填寫危險品運輸文件；(d) 緊急響應信息（如ERG、MSDS/SDS）；(e) 包裝及車輛須貼附標記及標籤（第9類危險標籤、鋰電池標識）。ADR第3.3章特殊規定377及ADR 2.2.9.1適用於大型電池。荷電狀態限值：空運須≤30%（IATA PI 965 Section IB），某些ADR條款亦有規定。對於途經波羅的海各國往返愛沙尼亞的轉運貨物，ADR文件及車輛標牌須在貫穿歐盟成員國公路運輸期間保持有效。

standards_or_laws: ADR 2025 — Chapter 3.3 SP 377, SP 188, SP 230; Section 2.2.9.1; Packing Instructions P903, P908
IMDG Code Amendment 41-22 — SP 188, SP 230, SP 384; Packing Instructions P903, P908
IATA DGR 65th Edition 2024 — Packing Instructions PI 965, PI 966, PI 967; Special Provisions A88, A99, A154, A164, A183
UN Model Regulations 23rd revised edition — Chapter 3.3, Chapter 6.1 packaging requirements
Regulation (EC) No 1272/2008 (CLP) — for SDS/labelling obligations where applicable

summary.en: China's export dangerous goods documentation requirements align with IMDG and IATA for sea and air freight. For road within China, JT/T 617.1-2018 (Classification of dangerous goods for road transport) and JT/T 617.4-2018 (Packaging and labelling) apply. The China Civil Aviation Administration (CAAC) DGR mirrors IATA PI 965/966/967. Export customs (GACC) requires a dangerous goods inspection certificate (危险品检验证书) for certain battery shipments. Packaging must meet GB 12463 (General technical requirements for dangerous goods transport packaging) for domestic road, or UN-certified packaging for export.
summary.zh: 中国出口危险品文件要求与海运IMDG和空运IATA保持一致。中国境内公路运输适用JT/T 617.1-2018（公路运输危险货物品名表）和JT/T 617.4-2018（包装及标识）。中国民用航空局（CAAC）危险品规则参照IATA PI 965/966/967。海关总署（GACC）对特定电池出口要求危险品检验证书。国内公路运输包装须符合GB 12463（危险货物运输包装通用技术条件），出口须采用UN认证包装。
summary.zht: 中國出口危險品文件要求與海運IMDG和空運IATA保持一致。中國境內公路運輸適用JT/T 617.1-2018（公路運輸危險貨物品名表）和JT/T 617.4-2018（包裝及標識）。中國民用航空局（CAAC）危險品規則參照IATA PI 965/966/967。海關總署（GACC）對特定電池出口要求危險品檢驗證書。國內公路運輸包裝須符合GB 12463（危險貨物運輸包裝通用技術條件），出口須採用UN認證包裝。

standards_or_laws: JT/T 617.1-2018 — Classification of dangerous goods for road transport (China)
JT/T 617.4-2018 — Packaging and labelling for dangerous goods road transport (China)
GB 12463 — General technical requirements for dangerous goods transport packaging
CAAC Dangerous Goods Regulations (aligned with IATA DGR)
GACC dangerous goods inspection requirements for battery exports (verify with a licensed Chinese customs broker before shipment)

gap.en: Key gaps for a Chinese BESS exporter shipping to Estonia: (1) EU ADR requires a Dangerous Goods Safety Adviser (DGSA) to be appointed by the carrier — this role is not always mirrored in CN export logistics chains. (2) EU carriers and ports strictly enforce the Class 9 lithium battery mark (with watt-hour rating) on each package outer; CN factories may use older label formats. (3) ADR 2025 and IMDG 41-22 updated special provisions for large-energy battery consignments with additional notification requirements. (4) Sea shipments to Muuga Harbour require IMDG compliance; road transport from the port requires ADR re-documentation — a step sometimes missed by CN-origin shipments prepared only to IMDG. (5) Cold-weather packaging: battery shipments in Baltic winter conditions (below −20 °C ambient) may require thermal packaging to maintain SOC and cell temperature within acceptable ranges during transit.
gap.zh: 中国BESS出口商向爱沙尼亚发货的主要差距：(1) 欧盟ADR要求承运人任命危险品安全顾问（DGSA），该职责在中国出口物流链中并不总是有对应安排。(2) 欧盟承运人和港口严格要求每件外包装贴附第9类锂电池标记（含瓦时标注）；中国工厂可能沿用旧版标签格式。(3) ADR 2025和IMDG 41-22对大能量电池托运更新了特殊规定，增加了通知要求。(4) 海运至穆加港须符合IMDG规定；从港口出发的公路运输须按ADR重新出具文件——仅按IMDG准备的中国发货有时会遗漏此环节。(5) 寒冷天气包装：波罗的海冬季运输条件（环境温度低于-20°C）可能需要保温包装，以在运输过程中将荷电状态和电芯温度维持在可接受范围内。
gap.zht: 中國BESS出口商向愛沙尼亞發貨的主要差距：(1) 歐盟ADR要求承運人任命危險品安全顧問（DGSA），該職責在中國出口物流鏈中並不總是有對應安排。(2) 歐盟承運人和港口嚴格要求每件外包裝貼附第9類鋰電池標記（含瓦時標注）；中國工廠可能沿用舊版標籤格式。(3) ADR 2025和IMDG 41-22對大能量電池托運更新了特殊規定，增加了通知要求。(4) 海運至穆加港須符合IMDG規定；從港口出發的公路運輸須按ADR重新出具文件——僅按IMDG準備的中國發貨有時會遺漏此環節。(5) 寒冷天氣包裝：波羅的海冬季運輸條件（環境溫度低於-20°C）可能需要保溫包裝，以在運輸過程中將荷電狀態和電芯溫度維持在可接受範圍內。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ADR, IMDG, and IATA dangerous goods documentation, packaging, and labelling requirements are legally binding for all modes; non-compliance can result in shipment rejection, fines, or criminal liability. Port of Tallinn / Muuga Harbour enforces IMDG requirements for maritime arrivals.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — CAAC/IATA and IMDG rules enforced by carriers; JT/T 617 mandatory for domestic road; GACC inspection requirements apply to certain battery exports.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. Shipping BESS from China to Estonia requires a full dangerous goods compliance programme: UN 38.3 test summaries, correct UN number classification, UN-certified packaging, mode-specific documentation (ADR/IMDG/IATA), Class 9 labels, SOC management, appointment of a DGSA for EU road legs, and cold-weather thermal packaging for Baltic winter transit. For multimodal sea+road shipments via Muuga Harbour, ADR re-documentation is required at port of entry. Engage a certified DGSA and a specialist dangerous goods freight forwarder before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。从中国向爱沙尼亚运输BESS需建立完整的危险品合规体系：UN 38.3测试摘要、正确的UN编号分类、UN认证包装、按运输方式出具文件（ADR/IMDG/IATA）、第9类标签、荷电状态管理、为欧盟公路段任命DGSA，以及波罗的海冬季运输的低温保温包装。对于通过穆加港的海运+公路多式联运，须在入境港补充ADR文件。首次发货前请聘用持证DGSA及专业危险品货代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。從中國向愛沙尼亞運輸BESS需建立完整的危險品合規體系：UN 38.3測試摘要、正確的UN編號分類、UN認證包裝、按運輸方式出具文件（ADR/IMDG/IATA）、第9類標籤、荷電狀態管理、為歐盟公路段任命DGSA，以及波羅的海冬季運輸的低溫保溫包裝。對於通過穆加港的海運+公路多式聯運，須在入境港補充ADR文件。首次發貨前請聘用持證DGSA及專業危險品貨代。
